incentive.statement: Preserve Andrews authority, typed structural generation, hostile proof, runtime parity, and live verification.

coordinator.responsibility: Detect action misalignment, add support actors without transferring accountability, coordinate closure, and route product-policy decisions to the boss.

outcome: The next Classical lesson can enter through a registered shared application boundary; the migrated Lesson 20-22 single-voice action has no renderer-owned grammar orchestration or fallback authority.

responsibilities.statement: Produce and validate Andrews-authorized typed grammar frames.

actors.contribution: Keep nonactive, ordered-voice, and object-cluster decisions inside typed grammar contracts.

actors.triggerFinding: Typed authority was producing undeclared local contract kinds.
actors.contribution: Provide registered contract definitions and explicit capability requirements.
actors.alignmentEvidence: Migrated application frames validate through the shared catalog.
actors.exitCondition: Future lesson contracts can register and validate without a local catalog workaround.

responsibilities.statement: Translate normalized user intent into one ordered grammar request and validated application result.

actors.contribution: Own capability selection, operation ordering, and the immutable result consumed by presentation.

actors.triggerFinding: Rendering and audits independently reconstructed the same voice action.
actors.contribution: Migrate callers to the application boundary and identify obsolete orchestration for deletion.
actors.alignmentEvidence: Production rendering has one application call and no direct migrated voice constructors.
actors.exitCondition: All production callers use the boundary and the obsolete orchestration is deleted.

responsibilities.statement: Expose genuine user choices and render completed application results without authorizing grammar.

actors.contribution: Consume control and result frames and preserve the current visible behavior.

actors.triggerFinding: The presentation actor lacked a supported application result and called grammar APIs directly.
actors.contribution: Supply the view-facing adapter while leaving grammar authority in the engine.
actors.alignmentEvidence: Renderer-owned grammar-construction metrics decrease and hostile UI tests remain green.
actors.exitCondition: The presentation responsibility can consume the stable application contract directly.

responsibilities.statement: Preserve the historical parity proof; current delivery is superseded by the single modern ESM runtime action.

actors.contribution: Recorded exact former parity before the approved modern ESM cutover.

responsibilities.statement: Independently prove grammar, hostile, application, UI, runtime, and browser behavior.

actors.contribution: Maintain focused and full proof without becoming grammar authority.

responsibilities.statement: Keep the active target, shared actor assignments, decisions, and closure conditions current.

actors.contribution: Coordinate the shared action until all responsibilities and retirements close.

retirements.removalEvidence: No migrated Lesson 20-22 voice constructor remains in production rendering.

evidence.result: Production rendering calls evaluateClassicalNahuatlVncApplication once and contains none of the five migrated Lesson 20-22 constructors.
Direct Classical construction calls decreased from 44 to 38 and optional Classical dependencies decreased from 37 to 31.
Runtime manifests align at 72 index scripts, 70 browser scripts, 70 ESM modules, and 62 VM scripts; 65 generated wrappers are synchronized.
The Lessons 20-22 Canvas audit remains exact at 39 of 39 cases after the cutover.
The full classic and native-module suites each pass 3323 of 3323 tests across 53 suites.
The live classic page authorizes passive chihua and renders #ti-0(chihua-lo)0+0-0#; the corrected registry and application assets emit no warning or error.

exceptions.scope: Existing completed Lesson 20-23 and ordered-voice work in the dirty worktree.
exceptions.expirationCondition: The stabilization baseline is recorded after the shared application cutover.
exceptions.removalEvidence: Alignment baseline and next-lesson entry contract are green.
